description: Ascend NPU migration agent hooks — injects migration rules on session start and validates code changes post-edit. INSTALL NOTE: The install.sh script reads this file and merges entries into ~/.claude/settings.json with absolute paths. The ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} placeholder below is replaced at install time.

manual_setup.description: If install.sh cannot be used, manually add these entries to ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. Replace {PLUGIN_ROOT} with the absolute path to this plugin's directory.
